data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for preference and consent visibility per channel/purpose.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of preference and consent visibility per channel/purpose. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or reads that confirm the existence of such visibility. The prior steps focus on actions like creating offers and bookings, but none address the core requirement of preference and consent visibility, indicating a gap in the implementation.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming preference and consent visibility per channel/purpose.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
